retrieved_result: Good ping in speed test, bad ping in games? Good ping in speed test, bad ping in games?josh S Feb 19, 2011, 3:28 AMhttp://www.speedtest.net/result/1164020953.png playing halo pc on an atlanta server gives me 66-100ms ping. in halo, the ping times are rounded up, so if you have 26 ping, the game will show 33 ping, etc. i live 400 miles from ch
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses network ping and speed tests and has no relation to easy DIY room decoration ideas.
